Okay, so welcome back to section six where we'll be slaughtering some of your prospects, sacred cows. Now just to recap, these are the beliefs, the myths, the misconceptions that have led them astray and left them really kind of in this hopeless state experiencing that moment of highest tension. So we're going to slaughter those sacred cows and then immediately fill that vacuum and use space with the empowering beliefs which have adopted and acted on and power them to enjoy that moment of highest pleasure, that Andy Dufresne, Shawshank Redemption moment we just spoke about in the last module. So in its simplest form, sacred cows are the reasons they're experiencing the moment of highest tension. And the new empowering beliefs are the reasons why they'll soon experience the moment of highest pleasure. Or put in another way, sacred cows are diagnostic of why they've experienced the symptoms in section four. And they're really kind of diagnostic of the reason for that gap between the moment of highest tension and moment of highest pleasure. Whereas the new empowering beliefs are going to be prescriptive of what it takes to experience everything we spoke about in section five. So here's what this looks like on a coaching the conversion level. In slaughtering the sacred cows, we are offering self forgiveness through an emotionally compelling and intellectually satisfying why it's not your fault, which when you do that, it brings a sense of self forgiveness of understanding of closure, which then brings receptivity. They're giving them that clear diagnosis for the symptoms experienced in that moment of highest tension. Once again, that's where the clarity comes into play. And when we do that, they release all these doubts and confusing thoughts about what they're trying to do. And this creates this momentary void in belief, this momentary disorientation, which in turn invites a certain sense of receptivity to fill it, as well as the renewed energy and excitement around doing so. So you know, in a nutshell, this is really about creating that renewed energy through self forgiveness and understanding why things haven't gone so well in the past. When it comes to the belief installation, we're continuing that theme and coaching that empowerment and that renewed optimism, really ramping that element up and giving them the gift of revelation or insight. So these are really those aha moments. And I really want you to take a moment and think back to when you've had a breakthrough or a major insight and how those immediate shifts just kind of ignited this new wave of energy and possibility for you. So that's what we want to offer your prospect with the belief installation. We're also going to get very prescriptive about the beliefs and actions that will enable the moment of highest pleasure as well as start seeding a blue ocean solution that satisfies and uniquely satisfies those beliefs and agreements. So I really want to bring up this image here. What we're doing with those empowering beliefs is we're really trying to put you in this category of one. We're trying to set up this very specific maze and labyrinth and those are really kind of the agreements that your product solves. And it's really the only escape plan possible that satisfies those conditions. And we could bring it back to our good friend Andy here. He has a very unique escape tunnel that goes through the Shawshank walls and he had to dig a very specific hole through his prison cell. So think of these beliefs that you are engineering as the blueprint and foundation for the blue ocean bridge that we'll talk about a little later in this module. So with that said, we're going to get into how to write it. You should already have done a rough draft of these sections of these sacred cows and corresponding belief shifts in section four of the Launch Bible. If you haven't, now would be the time to revisit it and really get these done. If you do need more inspiration, we do have a stack of examples in the video right below this. But if you are feeling inspired and ready to move forward, I invite you to stop these videos and get started writing your sacred cows and belief installation.
